logo_suite: Primary lockup: Cap plus circuit or sprint-track academic badge. with the full business name.
Icon mark: simplify the Cap plus circuit or sprint-track academic badge. into a square avatar for favicons, socials, and app badges.
Text-only wordmark: keep one clean horizontal version for signatures, invoices, PDFs, and letterhead.
letterhead: Top band uses the primary color, logo lockup, and one short positioning line.
Contact block shows website, support inbox, and one escalation inbox in the footer.
Invoices, proposals, and one-page PDFs keep the display font for headings and the body font for all operational copy.

social_profiles.bio_focus: Owned pages, Teachable checkout, Circle community surfaces, and cohort invitations need one clean academic sprint system

posting_cadence.label: Authority-service cadence
schedule: Prepare 1 authority post each weekday, 2 short-form proof clips per week, and 1 email follow-up per week for review.
Tie every post to one bounded offer, one proof point, or one objection-handling angle.
Keep publication blocked until operator approval, but keep the queue continuously review-ready.
calendar: Weekend: FAQ, recap, or evergreen library update

merch_review_scope: Merch is not a primary launch surface for AI Sprint Academy.
If created at all, keep it review-only and limited to leave-behind collateral, presentation decks, or operator onboarding materials.
